## add mantel pipeline outut to permanova df
```{r}

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df<-
  left_join(perm_70_phylosig_pct_df,fun_alltaxa_mantel_pipeline_df_reshaped)

```

## define PCoA variance explained by the PC with highest abouheif
```{r}
#re-arrange which is the hgiehr PC
perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_Control<-
  gsub(x = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$trait_Control_Higher_PC, pattern = "_[a-z]_.*", replacement = "")

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_MeJA<-
  gsub(x = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$trait_MeJA_Higher_PC, pattern = "_[a-z]_.*", replacement = "")

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_SA<-
  gsub(x = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$trait_SA_Higher_PC, pattern = "_[a-z]_.*", replacement = "")

# define PCoA_1/ PCoA2 varaince aexplained ratio
perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$var_explined_ratio_Control<-
  (perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_Control_only/perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_Control_only)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$var_explined_ratio_MeJA<-
  (perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_MeJA_only/perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_MeJA_only)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$var_explined_ratio_SA<-
  (perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_SA_only/perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_SA_only)

# assing the abouheif value for each PCoA in each treatmet condition, (hard-coded)
perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_Control_abouheif_value<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_Control == "PCoA_1",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_Control_Higher_PC,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_Control_Lower_PC)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_Control_abouheif_value<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_Control == "PCoA_2",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_Control_Higher_PC,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_Control_Lower_PC)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_MeJA_abouheif_value<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_MeJA == "PCoA_1",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_MeJA_Higher_PC,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_MeJA_Lower_PC)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_MeJA_abouheif_value<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_MeJA == "PCoA_2",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_MeJA_Higher_PC,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_MeJA_Lower_PC)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_SA_abouheif_value<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_SA == "PCoA_1",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_SA_Higher_PC,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_SA_Lower_PC)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_SA_abouheif_value<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_SA == "PCoA_2",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_SA_Higher_PC,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$value_SA_Lower_PC)

# assing the % PCoA explained in the PCoA wth higer abouheif
perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_Control_pct<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_Control == "PCoA_1",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_Control_only,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_Control_only)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$lower_PC_Control_pct<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_Control == "PCoA_2",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_Control_only,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_Control_only)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_MeJA_pct<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_MeJA == "PCoA_1",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_MeJA_only,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_MeJA_only)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$lower_PC_MeJA_pct<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_MeJA == "PCoA_2",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_MeJA_only,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_MeJA_only)
          
perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_SA_pct<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_SA == "PCoA_1",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_SA_only,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_SA_only)

perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$lower_PC_SA_pct<-
  ifelse(test = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$higher_PC_SA == "PCoA_2",
         yes = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_1_SA_only,
         no = perm_70_phylosig_pct_df$PCoA_2_SA_only)

```



### save processed 70 PERMANOVAS df

```{r}
# save df of 70 permanovas, % variance, Abouheif values, beta dispersion results
save(perm_70_phylosig_pct_df, file = "./14_Phylogenetic_distance/r_objects/perm_70_phylosig_pct_df.RData")
load(file = "./14_Phylogenetic_distance/r_objects/perm_70_phylosig_pct_df.RData")
view(perm_70_phylosig_pct_df)
```


# check mantel pairwise correlations of fungi
```{r}



#export example mantel plot pariiwise comparisons among samples
ggsave(ggarrange(fun_alltaxa_mantel_pipeline_bray_correlation_plot$k__Fungi,
                 fun_alltaxa_mantel_pipeline_bray_correlation_plot$c__Sordariomycetes,
                 fun_alltaxa_mantel_pipeline_bray_correlation_plot$o__Hypocreales,
                 ncol = 3),
       width = 450,
       height = 350,
       units = "mm",
       filename = "./14_Phylogenetic_distance/results/Results_April2023/mantel_pairwise_Fungi.pdf",)

```


```
